scenario.scene: Weights area of a premium gym, dumbbell rack in soft focus behind, black rubber flooring, a lifting bench in the foreground. Industrial pendant lighting overhead. Dark exposed-brick wall on the right.
scenario.outfit: Deep burgundy cropped tank top, matching burgundy bike shorts with a double-band waistband, cropped white socks, white minimalist trainers. Hair tied in a messy bun on top of her head, a few pieces falling around her face. Small silver studs.
scenario.pose: Sitting on the lifting bench, knees apart, leaning slightly forward with her forearms resting on her thighs, looking off-camera to the side as if catching her breath after a set.

hand_assignment.other_hand_does: both arms rest forward on her thighs

scenario.grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits on the lifting bench beside her right thigh, front face angled toward the camera, a stainless steel water bottle next to it, a small folded grey gym towel beside both. Product is the foreground hero.
scenario.lighting: Warm overhead industrial pendant light slightly behind her, creating a soft warm rim on her shoulders and hair, with cooler ambient fill from the gym ceiling. Warm glow on the box's front face.
scenario.palette: deep burgundy, charcoal black, warm pendant amber, polished concrete grey
scenario.framing: three-quarter (waist up, with bench surface visible to the right)
scenario.camera_height: slightly below her eye line, looking up
resolves_failure_modes: low feasibility pose pivot — placement on surface instead of held
scenario.notes: Tests product-on-surface composition. Product is hero of the surface arrangement, persona is contextual.

step_1_output.step_1_image_prompt: A 25-year-old Mediterranean woman with sun-kissed deep-tan skin, green almond eyes, and brunette-with-blonde-balayage waves to her mid-back, captured in a candid amateur smartphone snapshot with natural skin texture and visible pores. She is wearing a deep burgundy cropped tank top, matching burgundy bike shorts with a double-band waistband, cropped white socks, white minimalist trainers, hair tied in a messy bun on top of her head with a few pieces falling around her face, small silver studs. She sits on a black padded lifting bench in the weights area of a premium gym, dumbbell rack softly out of focus behind her, polished black rubber flooring, dark exposed-brick wall on the right, industrial pendant lighting overhead. Sitting with knees apart, leaning slightly forward with both forearms resting on her thighs, looking off-camera to the side as if catching her breath after a set. Both hands are visible in the frame, not in her pockets, not behind her back, not cropped out of frame, fingers relaxed and lightly draped over her knees. The bench surface to her right side is empty in this part of the composition. Warm overhead industrial pendant light slightly behind her creating a soft warm rim on her shoulders and hair, with cooler ambient fill from the gym ceiling. Shot on Sony A7IV 35mm lens shallow depth of field, slightly below eye line looking up. Real photograph, not AI-generated, no model pose, candid moment. Post-set quiet recovery mood, palette of deep burgundy, charcoal black, warm pendant amber, polished concrete grey. Reference image is the persona — preserve her face, eye color, eye shape, brow shape, nose shape, lip shape, jaw line, and hair color exactly. Do not improvise her face.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, extra fingers, fused fingers, distorted face, asymmetric eyes, unnatural skin texture, plastic skin, AI-generated look, model pose, perfect symmetry, smooth airbrushed skin, glossy plastic skin, illustration, 3D render, CGI, doll-like features, magazine retouching

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits on the lifting bench beside her right thigh, front face angled toward the camera, a stainless steel water bottle next to it, a small folded grey gym towel beside both. Product is the foreground hero.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box onto the empty bench surface to her right, alongside a stainless steel water bottle and folded grey gym towel — product as foreground hero with warm pendant glow on its front face.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: id_weight at fal API cap (1.0). true_cfg at default 1.5 — three-quarter waist-up framing where face is mid-importance, sufficient alongside the burgundy outfit override and gym scene context.

step_2_output.step_2_image_prompt: Take the persona reference photo as the locked source for her face, hair color and messy bun styling, body proportions, deep burgundy cropped tank and bike shorts outfit, white trainers, and the entire premium gym scene including the lifting bench, dumbbell rack, black rubber flooring, and exposed-brick wall — all of these must remain faithful to the reference. The Alluvi product is now placed on the lifting bench surface beside her right thigh as the foreground hero of the composition, front face angled toward the camera, with a stainless steel water bottle standing just behind it and a small folded grey gym towel resting beside both items. The product is approximately 7 inches wide and 3 inches tall, sized realistically relative to the water bottle and towel on the bench. Do not enlarge the product beyond its actual proportions. Her body posture and arm position may shift slightly to make the seated recovery moment feel natural alongside the bench arrangement. Both hands must remain visible in the frame — both forearms continue to rest forward on her thighs with relaxed fingers. Do not hide either hand in pockets, behind her back, or crop them out of the frame. The Alluvi product packaging must match the product reference photo exactly — every text element, color, graphic, and certification badge as shown. Preserve the packaging's natural white base color; the warm pendant light should illuminate the white surface as light, not tint the white amber. Match the lighting direction of the persona scene: warm overhead industrial pendant light slightly behind her creating a soft warm rim, with cooler ambient fill from the gym ceiling, casting a soft shadow on the bench surface in front of the product.
